en: No, no, no, don't get up. I'm just gonna join you. That all right, J?
ko: 아니, 아니, 일어나지 마. 그냥 옆에 앉을게. 괜찮지, J?

en: You're not expecting anybody, are you?
You wouldn't be playing me like that, would you?
ko: 설마 나한테 그런 짓을 하진 않겠지?

en: So I'm just gonna sit here in this seat and tell you a little secret. I followed you.
ko: 그러니까 여기 앉아서 작은 비밀 하나 알려줄게. 내가 너를 미행했어.

en: Got in my big car and followed you
ko: 내 큰 차를 타고 너를 따라갔어.

en: I wanted to run you down, Rambo style. But I chilled. Hey, hey, whoa, whoa, wait.
ko: 람보처럼 너를 밀어버리고 싶었어. 하지만 참았어. 잠깐, 잠깐, 기다려.

en: I went back to our apartment
and canceled all our credit cards.
All your nice jewelry, I put it right up my ass. Bitch.
ko: 네 비싼 보석들 전부 내가 숨겼어. 이 나쁜 놈아.

en: Because you gotta learn about love.
